subtitles.original: Turn up radio そう今日も聞こえるよ
subtitles.english: Turn up radio, yes, I can hear it today too

subtitles.original: 風に揺られ流れる stereo
subtitles.english: the stereo sways in the wind

subtitles.original: 肩で刻む軽快な rhythm
subtitles.english: The rhythm is carved into my shoulder

subtitles.original: 想いをのっけて届けるよ rhyme
subtitles.english: and my feelings ride on the rhyme

subtitles.original: よく晴れた空の真下
subtitles.english: Right under the clear sky

subtitles.original: 僕らは遥かな未来目指しました
subtitles.english: we headed toward the far away future

subtitles.original: Master key 握り締め出発
subtitles.english: Grasping the master key tightly and departing

subtitles.original: 雑踏の中 Kick down 一発
subtitles.english: one kick down in the hustle and bustle

subtitles.original: 今思う闘いの日々
subtitles.english: Now I think about those days of fighting

subtitles.original: 感謝することに溢れ出す慈悲
subtitles.english: and I feel compassion overflowing with thanks

subtitles.original: しのぎを削ったあの攻防戦
subtitles.english: That battle that I fought so desperately in

subtitles.original: 今なお続くここは最前線
subtitles.english: still continues now, and the front line is right here

subtitles.original: 父から得た揺るぎ無い誇り
subtitles.english: I got my unfaltering pride from my father

subtitles.original: 母がくれた大きないたわり
subtitles.english: my mother gave me my large amount of consideration

subtitles.original: キミにもらう温かいぬくもり
subtitles.english: From you, I get warmth

subtitles.original: 明日への糧に生き抜くために
subtitles.english: it's my provision, so that I can live through 'till tomorrow

subtitles.original: I got sound, I got feel, I got beautiful days
subtitles.english: I got sound, I got feel, I got beautiful days

subtitles.original: I got song, I got love, I got grateful days
subtitles.english: I got song, I got love, I got grateful days

subtitles.original: I got it, yeah
subtitles.english: I got it, yeah

subtitles.original: You makes me happy, when sky's gray
